# [SN-01] LIF cortical columns on the γ mesh

> Plan ID `SN-01` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

✅ **Done on γ-surface.** `src/cortical_column.v` instantiates LIF
dynamics + BitNet b1.58 MLP + GF16 dot4 input projection per column.
Eight columns of cortex + four columns of CLARA-surface make up the
8×4 = 32-tile figure quoted in `info.yaml`.

## Evidence in this repo

- RTL: `src/cortical_column.v`, `src/trinity_quad_mesh.v` (16-PE),
  `src/trinity_mesh_2x2.v` (4-PE → 20-PE GF16 mesh total).
- Demo: [`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md) §Demo 1.
- Sim: `test/tb.v` + cocotb `test/Makefile`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] LIF column instantiated per cortical channel.
- [x] GF16 dot4 input projection drives the mesh.
- [x] Spike summary reaches the D2D router (`d2d_holo_mesh.v`).

## R5 honesty

LIF dynamics here are a **discrete-time** approximation matching the
ternary compute budget of γ; this is not a claim of analog or
sub-threshold neuromorphic behaviour.
